headline: Palantir Faces UK Boycott As Maven And NHS Deals Reshape Outlook
summary: Palantir Technologies (NasdaqGS:PLTR) is under growing ethical scrutiny in the UK as NHS staff groups push for boycotts of its platforms. The pressure centers on Palantir's NHS data work and its defense sector contracts, including high profile US government programs. The company has responded publicly, defending its role in military projects and its approach to data governance and ethics. For investors watching Palantir at a share price of $147.93, this tension sits alongside a 1 year...
